sys_metadata_link.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_vehicle_ma_0_vehicle"> <x_snc_vehicle_ma_0_vehicle action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <city>Rüsselsheim</city> <country>Germany</country> <description>est lacinia nisi venenatis tristique fusce congue diam id ornare imperdiet sapien</description> <end_date>1978-04-19</end_date> <make>Opel</make> <model>Kadett</model> <pin>8494</pin> <start_date>1968-05-01</start_date> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-02-17 05:35:11</sys_created_on> <sys_id>85ed4be2fd8b32107f44b9211467fea8</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-02-17 05:35:11</sys_updated_on> <vin>JH4KA96682C098068</vin> <year>1968</year> </x_snc_vehicle_ma_0_vehicle> </record_update>
